head_commit.message:
Update dependencies, bump to v0.2.2 (#50)

* 格式化 Cargo.toml 文件，调整字段顺序以提高可读性

* update dependencies

* update axaddrspace to 0.3 and axvmconfig to 0.2, remove obsolete patch section.

* clean unused `cfg-if`

* bump to 0.2.2

* reset serde dependency version to 1.0

---------

Co-authored-by: 周睿 <zrufo747@outlook.com>
